requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and Dangerous Goods Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3与危险货物文件
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3與危險貨物文件

summary.en: For Moldova-bound lithium systems, transport documents commonly require UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III subsection 38.3 evidence for maritime, road, rail, or air shipment. The shipping route is landlocked and usually arranged via Romanian logistics corridors connected to the Giurgiulești Danube corridor, so documentation must match route-specific mode and carrier requirements.
summary.zh: 面向摩尔多瓦的锂电系统通常需要《联合国试验和标准手册》第III部第38.3条款的运输测试证据，适用于海运、公路、铁路或航空。由于摩尔多瓦内陆特性，运输通常经罗马尼亚通道衔接Giurgiulești多瑙河路线，因此文件需与具体运输方式及承运人要求一致。
summary.zht: 面向摩爾多瓦之鋰電系統通常需要《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第III部第38.3條款的運輸測試證據，適用於海運、公路、鐵路或航空。由於摩爾多瓦內陸特性，運輸通常經羅馬尼亞通道銜接Giurgiulești多瑙河路線，因此文件需與具體運輸方式及承運人要求一致。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3

summary.en: Chinese export chains usually maintain UN 38.3 reports and shipping-condition documents for outbound lithium-battery shipments. These can be leveraged for Moldova shipments, but only when matched to module-level state of charge, pack configuration, carrier mode, and declaration format used for the actual route.
summary.zh: 中国出口链通常保有UN 38.3报告及中国向外出口锂电运输条件文件。用于摩尔多瓦运输时可部分复用，但前提是按实际路线匹配模组级荷电状态、电池配置、运输方式和申报格式。
summary.zht: 中國出口鏈通常保有UN 38.3報告及中國向外出口鋰電運輸條件文件。用於摩爾多瓦運輸時可部分複用，但前提是按實際路線匹配模組級荷電狀態、電池配置、運輸方式與申報格式。

standards_or_laws: China outbound dangerous-goods transport records for lithium batteries

gap.en: Exporters should maintain model-specific transport packages for the Moldova lane, including net mass, cell type, packing method, temperature controls, special handling declarations, and declaration of dangerous goods references for Romanian transit and Giurgiulești-connected routes.
gap.zh: 出口商应为摩尔多瓦航线建立型号对应运输包，包括净重、单体类型、包装方法、温控、特殊处理声明和针对罗马尼亚过境及Giurgiulești衔接路线的危险货物申报。
gap.zht: 出口商應為摩爾多瓦航線建立型號對應運輸包，包括淨重、單體類型、包裝方法、溫控、特殊處理聲明以及針對羅馬尼亞過境及Giurgiulești銜接路線之危險貨物申報。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated lithium-battery movement where the selected transport mode and route incorporate UN dangerous-goods obligations
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China dangerous-goods transport records are useful but route-specific implementation is required for Moldova logistics

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 compliance remains a transport requirement, not a Moldova market-approval route. Align the transport declaration, route documents, and dangerous-goods notices to Giurgiulești-to-Romania corridor operations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3是运输要求，不是摩尔多瓦市场准入批准。请将运输申报、路线文件和危险品通知与Giurgiulești至罗马尼亚走廊实际操作对齐。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3是運輸要求，不是摩爾多瓦市場准入批准。請將運輸申報、路線文件和危險品通知與Giurgiulești至羅馬尼亞走廊實際操作對齊。
